name: Job FIle Initiated
Mandatory Fields on TS
script:
if doc.proposed_system_kw__tier:
    required_fields = [
        "panel",
        "inverter",
        "battery",
        "battery_qty_bom",
        "inverter_qty_bom",
        "panel_qty_bom",
        # Direction fields
        "front",
        "left",
        "back_right",
        "back",
        "front_right",
        "back_left",
        "right",
        "front_left",
        "front_down"
    ]

    for field in required_fields:
        if not doc.get(field):
            frappe.throw(f"{field.replace('_', ' ').title()} is mandatory when Proposed System is selected.")
